name: Spicy Chicken Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 3/4-inch pieces and mix with oil, paprika, and chili powder. Place the chicken on a serving plate.
2. To make the curry sauce, heat oil in a saucepan. Add onion and cook until soft. Stir in curry powder and cook for 2 minutes. Stir in flour, then gradually stir in milk, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil, then continue cooking until the sauce thickens. Simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add chutney and season with salt and pepper. Serve hot with the chicken cooked in the hot oil.
